contents: Ringtone Gold Mine - 100 Rare and Origin

cruft_removed.folder: Mos Dub - produced by Max Tannone

notes_for_future: ANCHOR GAP: Chris named David Byrne as foundational anchor, but the collection only contains Byrne via Eno collaborations. No solo Byrne, no Talking Heads albums. Probably means most of his Byrne consumption is non-MP3 (vinyl, streaming, memory) — or the MP3 collection is genuinely thin on that anchor. Worth surfacing later.
ANCHOR CONFIRMED: Foundational anchors per Chris's explicit declaration: Johnny Cash, John Zorn, Tom Waits, David Byrne.
